target_model.label: Gemma 4 31B IT NVFP4
target_model.doc_summary: NVIDIA-optimized NVFP4 checkpoint. Inputs are text, image, and video; output is text. This local lab can route it through an experimental WSL vLLM path on NVIDIA Blackwell.

target_quantization.label: NVFP4
target_quantization.doc_summary: NVIDIA ModelOpt NVFP4 checkpoint format. The official model card targets vLLM on NVIDIA Blackwell under Linux. This lab bridges it through a local WSL vLLM runtime with tuned memory settings.

audio_probe.detail: VRAM currently holds Gemma 4 26B A4B in SFP8. Click Load model to switch to Gemma 4 E2B / SFP8 before sending.
